ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

about.description:
BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an
AI-driven agile development framework providing 12+ specialized AI agent
personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports
scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems.
about.summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle

about.description:
BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an
AI-driven agile development framework providing 12+ specialized AI agent
personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports
scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems.
about.summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle

name: bmad-method
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: bmad-method
  version: "6.6.0"

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: d33508f0a84907172508e816853bee27a91a513876bdc18430f37fc12f44db81

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic

requirements:
  host:
    - nodejs 20.*
  run:
    - nodejs >=20
    - if: unix
      then:
        - __unix
    - if: win
      then:
        - __win

tests:
  - script:
      - if: not win
        then:
          - bmad --help
          - bmad-method --help
        else:
          - bmad.bat --help
          - bmad-method.bat --help
about:
  homepage: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle
  description: |
    BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an
    AI-driven agile development framework providing 12+ specialized AI agent
    personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
    workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports
    scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems.
  documentation: https://bmad.io
  repository: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - rxm7706
    - killua156

about.description:
BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an

personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports
scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems.
about.summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle
